plan.failureSummary: The deterministic cache attempted to fill a 'Last Name' field that does not exist in the current UI layout. Visual evidence shows the page is displaying 'Set 2' of the survey, which uses a single 'Your Name' field instead of split name fields.
observedIndicators: page.ai tool call 'inputText' failed with selector mismatch
UI shows 'Set 2' badge, indicating a layout variation
Visual comparison: failure screenshot shows 'Your Name' field while cache looked for 'Last Name'
usedDeterministicMode = true on a first attempt failure

remediationSteps.summary: Retry with cleared cache to handle dynamic UI layout.
remediationSteps.details: Trigger a retry with 'clearPageAiCache' set to true. This will force the agent to re-examine the page and generate new instructions for the 'Set 2' form layout.

remediationSteps.summary: Evaluate if DETERMINISTIC mode is appropriate for this unstable UI.
remediationSteps.details: If this test is meant to be stable across layout changes, consider running it in 'AUTONOMOUS' mode or ensuring the cache handles multiple UI variations.

plan.notes: The website 'unstable-survey' is intentionally dynamic. The failure occurred in DETERMINISTIC mode because the cached instructions were for a different form version. Since the overall objective ('Fill out all survey questions') is semantically flexible, clearing the cache will allow the agent to adapt to the 'Set 2' layout.
